title: Assignment A1 is now posted on accepi
content:
The assignment is based on Lecture 1 which covers Chapters 1 and 2 in the Textbook. To see it please go to accepi.com. If you have not done so yet, please register on accepi using the following link: accepi.com/register?t=7nqXXFQt Links to an external site.

 

Pls let me know if you have questions,

julian
